# Release v1.1.0

Splits the project into two distinct packages: the game engine is now published separately as [`t3core`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/t3core), and this repository becomes the standalone CLI consumer (`t3core-cli`).

---

## Changelog

## [1.1.0] - 2026-05-17

### Added

- `t3core` npm package as a runtime dependency — game logic (`Board`, `Game`, types, events) is now consumed from the published library instead of being bundled in this repo
- `preferGlobal: true` in `package.json` to signal the intended global installation pattern
- `cli` keyword to `package.json`

### Removed

- Bundled game core (`src/core/`) — `Board.ts`, `Game.ts`, `index.ts`, types, constants, and utils are fully removed in favour of `t3core`
- `vitest` and test files (`src/core/tests/`) — unit tests for the game engine live in the `t3core` repo
- `eventemitter3` runtime dependency (now an internal detail of `t3core`)
- `jiti` dev dependency

### Changed

- Binary renamed from `tic-tac-toe-core` to `t3core-cli`
- Package description updated to *"Interactive Tic Tac Toe CLI — play in your terminal via npx t3core-cli"*
- Repository URL updated to `github.com/TenGosc007/t3core-cli`
- UI source tree flattened: `src/ui/**` → `src/**` (removed the `ui/` nesting layer)
- All UI components updated to import from `t3core` instead of local `src/core`

[1.1.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core-cli/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0
